title: PRESCHOOL PROMISE - 211info
text: DEPARTMENT OF EARLY LEARNING AND CARE CHILD CARE PRESCHOOL PROMISE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps locate publicly funded preschools in family care, center, and school settings. Eligible students are matched to sites based on family preference and need. Setting options include days, hours of operation, transportation, primary language, bilingual programs, curriculum, and approach. Website Eligibility: -Must be ages 3-4 before September 1st of the calendar year -Household income must be below 200% of the federal poverty level -Must be an Oregon resident -Families receiving SNAP do not need to provide additional income verification -Housing Adjustment: Eligibility Specialists may adjust a family’s gross income calculation when determining eligibility to account for excessive housing costs. This applies to families who do not meet income eligibility but spend more than 30% of their gross income on housing costs. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, proof of address LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Child Care Expense Assistance * Foster Children Child Care Expense Assistance * Preschool Age Children Preschool Referral Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - DIRECT PAY UNIT EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - OREGON PRENATAL TO KINDERGARTEN INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - INCLUSIVE PARTNERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
